Anima Ambusher.name: Anima Ambusher
Anima Ambusher.description: Spectre Stride now deals an additional 125% of its damage dealt over 5 seconds.

Apparition.name: Apparition
Apparition.description: Increases the damage of Spectre Stride by 30% and reduces the chance for enemies to see you while stealthed.

Backswing.name: Backswing
Backswing.description: Increases the Runic Power generated by Reap by 5.

Behemoth.name: Behemoth
Behemoth.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your Stamina by 20% and your Armor penetration by 10% of your Strength.

Between Shadows.name: Between Shadows
Between Shadows.description: Casting Spectre Stride now generates 1 Reaped Soul.

Beyond Death.name: Beyond Death
Beyond Death.description: Dealing damage with Reliquary of the Lost now has a 8% chance to launch an additional Soul Bolt.

Beyond the Veil.name: Beyond the Veil
Beyond the Veil.description:
Level 40 Passive
Entering Underwalk now grants you Beyond the Veil, increasing movement speed by 30% and allowing you to walk on water.

Blood Frenzy.name: Blood Frenzy
Blood Frenzy.description: Casting Harvest Time with an enemy targeted within 20 yds of you now unleashes a Blood Frenzy.Blood FrenzyDeals 1 + 36% AP Shadow Damage to your target every 0.75 sec for 7.5 seconds. At the end of the duration, the target takes an additional 457 + 45% AP Shadow Damage.

Blood Fueled.name: Blood Fueled
Blood Fueled.description: Increases the healing absorbed by Doomrend by 30%.

Blood Harvester.name: Blood Harvester
Blood Harvester.description:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Blood Knight.name: Blood Knight
Blood Knight.description: Critical strikes with Doomrend now refund a Reaped Soul.

Blood Wraith.name: Blood Wraith
Blood Wraith.description: Wraithblade now deals an additional 100% Weapon Damage and its Runic Power cost is reduced by -20.

Bolstered Form.name: Bolstered Form
Bolstered Form.description: Assume a bolstered form for 15 seconds, generating 30 Runic Power, increasing your Armor by 25%, and increasing your parry chance by 25%.

Bountiful Harvest.name: Bountiful Harvest
Bountiful Harvest.description: Increases the damage of Reap and Murder by 25%.

Burial Rites.name: Burial Rites
Burial Rites.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Rites by 20%.

Callous Soul.name: Callous Soul
Callous Soul.description: Increases the amount of armor Soulrend causes you to ignore by 10%.

Chasing Death.name: Chasing Death
Chasing Death.description: Deathchaser used against a target below 20% health will now reapply itself at the end of its duration until they die or until 5 seconds passes.

Crimson Death.name: Crimson Death
Crimson Death.description: Your Slaughter now has a 20% chance to cast an additional time free of cost.

Crimson Thirst.name: Crimson Thirst
Crimson Thirst.description: Your Physical damage dealt to enemies now grants Crimson Thirst for 20 seconds, stacking 5 times.Crimson Thirst (Stacks)Your next Murder within 15 seconds deals 10% increased damage and costs -10% less Runic Power per stack. At 5 stacks, it also heals you equal to 50% of the damage dealt.

Crimson Wraith.name: Crimson Wraith
Crimson Wraith.description: Increases your critical stike damage by 10%.

Crow's Harvest.name: Crow's Harvest
Crow's Harvest.description:
Strike all nearby enemies for 55% Weapon Damage plus 11.

Damage dealt harvests a |cffffffffSoul Fragment|r, up to a maximum of 3.

Damned.name: Damned
Damned.description: When you gain Soul Infusion, you are protected from being slowed below 100% of normal speed for 5 seconds.

Dark Fate.name: Dark Fate
Dark Fate.description: Reduces the cost of Crow's Harvest by -10 Runic Power.

Dark Passage.name: Dark Passage
Dark Passage.description: Dealing direct critical strikes with Shadow damage reduce the cooldown of Limbo by -2 sec.

Dark Soldier.name: Dark Soldier
Dark Soldier.description: Increases your hit chance by 3% and reduces your Magic damage taken by -2%.

Dark Soul.name: Dark Soul
Dark Soul.description:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your Stamina equal to your Armor penetration rating.

Darkrend Scythe.name: Darkrend Scythe
Darkrend Scythe.description:
Damage dealt by Doomrend and Crow's Harvest now applies a bleed, dealing 56 + 8.5% AP Physical damage every 2 sec for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

Death Dealer.name: Death Dealer
Death Dealer.description: Increases the duration of Ghostly Weapon and Soulrend by 5 sec.

Death's Presence.name: Death's Presence
Death's Presence.description:
Increases all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Deathbringer.name: Deathbringer
Deathbringer.description: Increases the duration of Blood Frenzy and Harvest Time by 100%.

Deathchaser.name: Deathchaser
Deathchaser.description: Force death upon an enemy, dealing 35 Shadowfrost Damage, repeating every 0.25 sec for 1 sec, and generates Runic Power.

Deathstalker.name: Deathstalker
Deathstalker.description:
Mark an enemy target and increase your speed by 40% while within 20 yds of them for 15 sec. Dealing damage will break the effect.

While stalking an enemy, you are able to see all nearby stealthed enemies.

Stalking a Humanoid will apply |cFFFFFFFFAnxiety|r to them.@s:807776:0@

Deathwail.name: Deathwail
Deathwail.description: Reduces the Runic Power cost of Wraithblade by -50%.

Deathwind.name: Deathwind
Deathwind.description:
|cFF5ee2ffGenerates 1 Reaped Soul|r
Create a cloud of mist at the target location for 10 sec. Every 2 sec, enemies in the area take 35 Frost damage, healing you for 25% of the damage dealt.

Dirge.name: Dirge
Dirge.description:
|cff5ee2ffGenerates 2 Soul Fragments|r
Strike the enemy with both weapons, dealing 75% (139% if a dagger is equipped) Weapon Damage as Shadowfrost Damage with each, and generates Runic Power.

Dominator.name: Dominator
Dominator.description: Reduces the Runic Power cost of Soul Strike by $/10s;s1.

Dominion.name: Dominion
Dominion.description: Gaining Soul Infusion now increases your Armor by 585 for 6 seconds.

Doomer.name: Doomer
Doomer.description: Increases the damage of Doomrend and Slaughter by 30%.

Doomrend.name: Doomrend
Doomrend.description: Rend an enemy dealing 140% Weapon Damage plus 74, causing you to apply a dark shield to them that absorbs the next 157 healing done to them for 5 sec, and generates Runic Power.

Dreadknight.name: Dreadknight
Dreadknight.description: Increases your armor contribution from mail and plate items by 20% and reduces the chance for spells to hit you by -2%.

Dreadwake.name: Dreadwake
Dreadwake.description:
|cFF5ee2ffGenerates 1 Reaped Soul|r
Unleash a wave of souls upon enemies in a 12 yd cone, causing 80% Weapon Damage plus 10 to 12 Frost damage.

Eater of Souls.name: Eater of Souls
Eater of Souls.description:
Reaching 3 Reaped Souls now reduces your Physical damage taken by -10% and you regain 1% of your maximum health every 2 sec for 10 seconds. This will not trigger while already active.

In addition, the healing done by Deathwind is increased by 10%.

Empyrean Fortitude.name: Empyrean Fortitude
Empyrean Fortitude.description: Increases your parry chance by 5% and parrying an attack now generates 2 Runic Power.

Endbringer.name: Endbringer
Endbringer.description:
Become an Endbringer for 15 seconds, increasing the damage of Dirge by 30%, the range by 20 yds, and causes it to generate 3 Reaped Souls.

For the duration, Dirge will heal you for 75% of its damage dealt.

Essence Binder.name: Essence Binder
Essence Binder.description: Soul Strike now steals some of the target's health and Strength for 12 seconds, granting it to you at increased value.

Essence Harvest.name: Essence Harvest
Essence Harvest.description: Increases the additional Frost damage dealt by Ghostly Weapon by 10%.

Essence Invigoration.name: Essence Invigoration
Essence Invigoration.description: Casting abilities that require Soul Infusion now has a 50% chance to restore 5% of your missing health.

Ethereal Guard.name: Ethereal Guard
Ethereal Guard.description:
Reduces the damage taken by party and raid members by -3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your melee haste by 10%.

Executioner.name: Executioner
Executioner.description:
Level 40 Passive
Increases your critical strike rating by 20% of your Strength.

In addition, increases your Armor penetration by 30% against enemies below 35% health.

Extinction.name: Extinction
Extinction.description:
Level 20 Passive
Direct Physical damage dealt now has a 5% chance to grant you Extinction for 10 seconds.

Chance to trigger this effect is increased by 10% for each Reaped Soul active.ExtinctionYour next Slaughter is usable regardless of the target's health and costs -10 less Runic Power.

Fatesealer.name: Fatesealer
Fatesealer.description: Generating a Reaped Soul now reduces damage taken by -2% for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Final Requiem.name: Final Requiem
Final Requiem.description: Increases your critical strike chance with abilities that deal Shadow damage by 15% against enemies below 20% health.

Fleeting Soul.name: Fleeting Soul
Fleeting Soul.description: Reduces the cooldown of Soulslam by -15 sec.

From the Shadows.name: From the Shadows
From the Shadows.description: Exiting Underwalk increases your critical strike chance by 10% for 5 seconds.

Genocide.name: Genocide
Genocide.description: Increases the critical damage and critical strike chance of Slaughter by 10%.

Ghastly Advance.name: Ghastly Advance
Ghastly Advance.description: Increases the range of Spectre Stride by 5 yds and causes it to generate 5 more Runic Power.

Ghastly Form.name: Ghastly Form
Ghastly Form.description: After using Spectre Stride, Scythe Rush, or Veilwalk you now gain a shield that absorbs 114 + 33% AP damage for 6 seconds.

Ghastly Hilt.name: Ghastly Hilt
Ghastly Hilt.description: Ghostly Weapon now causes your melee abilities to strike up to 2 additional targets near the primary target.

Ghastly Screech.name: Ghastly Screech
Ghastly Screech.description: Screech with ghastly intent, silencing all nearby enemies for 4 sec, and dealing 209 Shadowfrost Damage at the end of the duration.

Ghost.name: Ghost
Ghost.description: Sinister Litany now increases the damage of your next spell or ability within 10 sec by 50% and casting it now grants you Ghost for 3 seconds.Ghost (Proc)Enter an enhanced stealth mode that does not break on damage dealt or taken.

Ghost Claw.name: Ghost Claw
Ghost Claw.description:
Chill an enemy with a ghostly claw, slowing and stealing 50% of their movement speed for 8 sec.

Whenever you kill an enemy, the cooldown of this ability is reset.

Ghost Form.name: Ghost Form
Ghost Form.description:
Shift into a ghostly form, gaining 60% increased movement speed, slowing your falling speed, and allowing you to walk on water.

Not usable in combat or indoors.

Ghostly Magic.name: Ghostly Magic
Ghostly Magic.description: Increases the damage of Reap, Dirge, and Reliquary of the Lost by 10%.

Ghostly Weapon.name: Ghostly Weapon
Ghostly Weapon.description:
2 Charges, 40 sec recharge
Imbue your weapon with ghostly power for 15 seconds, causing melee attacks to deal 25% additional damage as Frost damage.

Gravesite.name: Gravesite
Gravesite.description:
Casting Endbringer now marks the ground beneath you as your Gravesite for 15 seconds.

Direct critical strikes made against enemies within a Gravesite now deals 530 + 36% AP Shadow damage.

Greater Rite of Perseverance.name: Greater Rite of Perseverance
Greater Rite of Perseverance.description: All raid and party memebers pass through a rite, increasing their resistances by 20 for 30 min.

Greater Rite of Power.name: Greater Rite of Power
Greater Rite of Power.description: All raid and party members pass through a rite, increasing their Strength by 77 for 30 min.

Greater Rite of Resolve.name: Greater Rite of Resolve
Greater Rite of Resolve.description: Perform a resolving rite upon all allies, increasing their Stamina by 54 for 30 min.

Hard Bargain.name: Hard Bargain
Hard Bargain.description: While Tormented Souls is active on you, your melee attack speed is increased by 30% and your Dreadwake costs -5 less Runic Power.

Harnessed Life.name: Harnessed Life
Harnessed Life.description: Your Tormented Souls now has a -25% chance to not consume a stack from damage taken.

Harvest Time.name: Harvest Time
Harvest Time.description: Increases your damage and critical strike chance by 15% and gives your spells that require Soul Infusion a -50% to not consume the effect for 15 seconds.

Harvester.name: Harvester
Harvester.description:
Level 10 Passive
You now heal yourself equal to 15% of all damage dealt.

Harvester's Scythe.name: Harvester's Scythe
Harvester's Scythe.description: Increases the amount leeched by Soul Strike by 15%.

Harvesting Grounds.name: Harvesting Grounds
Harvesting Grounds.description:
Create a harvesting ground at the target location for 10 seconds, enemies inside have their melee and ranged haste and movement speed reduced by -20%

For the duration, enemies that try to exit the harvesting ground will be pulled back to its center.

Haunt.name: Haunt
Haunt.description:
|cffffffff3 Charges, 30 sec recharge|r
Create a visage of yourself that runs away from you to fool enemies for 10 sec.

Haunter.name: Haunter
Haunter.description: Increases the duration of Soulrend by 10 sec.

Hemorrhage.name: Hemorrhage
Hemorrhage.description: Increases the damage and critical strike chance of your abilities by 10% against enemies below 35% health.

Hungering Scythe.name: Hungering Scythe
Hungering Scythe.description: Increases the duration of Deathwind by 4 sec and Crow's Harvest now deals 15% additional damage to enemies inside.

Improved Ghost Form.name: Improved Ghost Form
Improved Ghost Form.description: Increases your speed while in |cffffffffGhost Form|r by 40%.

Intimidating Presence.name: Intimidating Presence
Intimidating Presence.description: Bolstered Form now increases the damage nearby enemies take from you by 15% for 15 seconds.

Into The Shadow Realm.name: Into The Shadow Realm
Into The Shadow Realm.description: Reduces the cooldown of Deathstalker, Soulstone Lure, and Soul Shear by -25%.

Jailer's Bargain.name: Jailer's Bargain
Jailer's Bargain.description:
Beckon the jailer, gaining a shield that absorbs damage equal to 30% of your maximum health for 10 seconds.

While this is active you are considered Undead and are immune to fear, sleep, and charm effects.

Jailer's Will.name: Jailer's Will
Jailer's Will.description: Soul Strike now deals 30% Strength increased damage, scaling with Strength.

Lamenting.name: Lamenting
Lamenting.description: Damage dealt by Ghostly Weapon now heals for 50% of the damage dealt.

Life Tap.name: Life Tap
Life Tap.description: Reduces the cooldown of Spectral Warden by -60 sec and it now heals you equal to 200% of the damage it deals.

Lifestealer.name: Lifestealer
Lifestealer.description: Increases the missing health generated by Soul Strike by 3%.

Limbo.name: Limbo
Limbo.description:
Rip out of your mortal shell for 5 seconds, making you immune to all harmful spell effects and instantly restoring 30% of your maximum health and Runic Power.

Usable while stunned, feared, or polymorphed.

Lord of Death.name: Lord of Death
Lord of Death.description: Abilities affected by Ghostly Weapon now deal 25% more damage per additional target.

Mark of Death.name: Mark of Death
Mark of Death.description: Increases the damage dealt by Deathchaser by 15% and your hit chance by 3%.

Masochistic Rage.name: Masochistic Rage
Masochistic Rage.description: After a 1 sec delay, you suffer 660 + 36% AP damage, enraging you and increasing your damage dealt by 20% for 15 seconds.

Maw Knight.name: Maw Knight
Maw Knight.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Doomrend by 5%.

Mawborn.name: Mawborn
Mawborn.description: Reduces the duration of disarm and incapacitate effects against you by -20%.

Mortal's End.name: Mortal's End
Mortal's End.description:
Level 30 Passive
Allows Extinction to stack an additional time and allows Wraithblade to grant you Extinction.ExtinctionYour next Slaughter is usable regardless of the target's health and costs -10 less Runic Power.

Murder.name: Murder
Murder.description:
|cff5ee2ffGenerates 1 Reaped Soul|r
Send soulcrows at an enemy, dealing 82 Shadow damage and reducing their chance to hit by 3% for 10 sec.

Mysterious Omen.name: Mysterious Omen
Mysterious Omen.description: Increases the range of Murder and Soul Shock by 5 yds.

Painbringer.name: Painbringer
Painbringer.description:
Generating Reaped Souls now has a 10% chance to trigger Masochistic Rage for 5 sec.

If Masochistic Rage is already active, it will instead extend the duration by 3 sec.

Painmail.name: Painmail
Painmail.description:
Dealing damage with Reap, Dreadwake and Soul Strike now grants a stack of Painmail for 15 seconds, stacking up to 8 times. Additional applications do not refresh the effect.

When Painmail stacks expire naturally, you are healed for 2% of your maximum health and reduce the cooldown of Bolstered Form by -0.5 sec for each stack.

Purgatory.name: Purgatory
Purgatory.description: When you gain Soul Infusion, the damage of your Soulrend and Reliquary of the Lost is increased by 20% for 6 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Ravenous Thirst.name: Ravenous Thirst
Ravenous Thirst.description: Reduces the Runic Power cost of Ghastly Screech and Soul Strike by -10.

Reap.name: Reap
Reap.description:
|cff5ee2ffGenerates 1 Soul Fragment|r
Strike an enemy for 80% Weapon Damage plus 17, and generates Runic Power.

Reaver.name: Reaver
Reaver.description: Reduces the cooldown of Deathstalker, Soul Shear, and Soulstone Lure by -50%.

Red Wake.name: Red Wake
Red Wake.description: Direct damage critical strikes now generate an additional Soul Fragment.

Reliquary of the Lost.name: Reliquary of the Lost
Reliquary of the Lost.description:
Store |cff5ee2ffReaped Souls|r in your weapon and transform their energy into |cFFFFFFFFSoul Bolts|r.

|cFFFFFFFFSoul Bolts|r launch forward over 5 seconds, each dealing 145 Shadowfrost Damage to enemies in a line.

Consumes |cff5ee2ffReaped Souls|r and |cff5ee2ffSoul Infusion|r.

Requiem.name: Requiem
Requiem.description: Swing at enemies around you in a fury of souls, dealing 137 Shadowfrost Damage, reducing their melee and ranged attack speed by 20% for 15 sec, and generating Runic Power.

Rite of Perseverance.name: Rite of Perseverance
Rite of Perseverance.description: Allied player passes through a rite, increasing their resistances by 10 for 30 min.

Rite of Power.name: Rite of Power
Rite of Power.description: Allied player passes through a rite, increasing their Strength by 20 for 30 min.

Rite of Resolve.name: Rite of Resolve
Rite of Resolve.description: Perform a resolving rite upon an ally, increasing their Stamina by 20 for 30 min.

Scythe Rush.name: Scythe Rush
Scythe Rush.description:
Rush towards an enemy and generate 15 Runic Power.

Cannot be used on the same target more than once every 20 seconds.

Sepulchral Renewal.name: Sepulchral Renewal
Sepulchral Renewal.description:
Resets the cooldown of Limbo, Soulslam, and Shade.

Usable while stealthed.

Sever.name: Sever
Sever.description: Attempt to drain an enemies vitals, leeching 67 health, interrupting casting and preventing any spell from that school from being cast for 3 sec.

Shade.name: Shade
Shade.description: Become a shade, entering an improved stealth mode for 10 seconds and entering Underwalk. Removes all movement impairing effects.

Shattered Souls.name: Shattered Souls
Shattered Souls.description: Your Wraithblade now deals double damage to enemies affected by Soulrend.

Shudder Scythe.name: Shudder Scythe
Shudder Scythe.description: Your Murder is transformed into Shudder Scythe, which costs additional Runic Power but deals increased damage and generates Soul Fragments.Shudder Scythe (Transform)Strike an enemy 5 times, each dealing 30% Weapon Damage, scaling with level, and granting you a Soul Fragment with each strike.

Sinister Litany.name: Sinister Litany
Sinister Litany.description: Embrace your sinister thoughts, instantly generating 3 Reaped Souls.

Siphon Anima.name: Siphon Anima
Siphon Anima.description: When you summon a Spectral Scythe, you now heal for 5% of your damage dealt for 10 seconds.

Slaughter.name: Slaughter
Slaughter.description:
|cff5ee2ffGenerates 1 Reaped Soul|r
Eradicate an enemy with your scythe, dealing 130% Weapon Damage plus 29.

Only usable on enemies below 35% health.

Soul Bane.name: Soul Bane
Soul Bane.description: Reduces the cooldown of Reliquary of the Lost by -5 sec.

Soul Furnace.name: Soul Furnace
Soul Furnace.description: Increases the amount leeched from Soul Harvest by an additional 50%.

Soul Generator.name: Soul Generator
Soul Generator.description:
Critical strikes with Dirge now generate 10 Runic Power.

Critical strikes with Murder now generate 1 additional Reaped Soul.

Soul Harvest.name: Soul Harvest
Soul Harvest.description: Generating Reaped Souls now triggers Soul Harvest. Soul Harvest (Damage)Blasts your target for 1 + 5% AP + 10% shadow SP Shadow Damage, healing for 100% of the damage dealt.

Soul Harvester.name: Soul Harvester
Soul Harvester.description: Landing the killing blow on a target that yields experience or honor now grants Soul Harvester for 10 seconds.Soul HarvesterAfter killing an enemy you generate 2 Runic Power every 1 sec.

Soul Knight.name: Soul Knight
Soul Knight.description: Your successful parries and dodges increase all healing you receive by 2% and reduce all Magic damage taken by -2% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Soul Piercer.name: Soul Piercer
Soul Piercer.description: Striking at least 1 enemy with Soulslam now refunds its Reaped Souls.

Soul Protector.name: Soul Protector
Soul Protector.description: Increases Armor contribution from items by 25% and increases your magic resistances by 21.

Soul Slip.name: Soul Slip
Soul Slip.description:
Level 30 Passive
Avoiding attacks now has a 50% chance to harvest a Soul Fragment from the attacker.

Soul Splinters.name: Soul Splinters
Soul Splinters.description: Erupt with ghastly force whenever you harvest a Reaped Soul, dealing 47 + 10.5% Stamina + 15% AP Spellshadow Damage to nearby enemies over 6 seconds.

Soul Strike.name: Soul Strike
Soul Strike.description:
|cff5ee2ffGenerates 1 Reaped Soul|r
Strikes an enemy for 75% Weapon Damage plus 39 as Shadow damage, healing for 80% of the damage dealt, plus 10% of your missing health.

Soul Tap.name: Soul Tap
Soul Tap.description:
Chip away at the very essence of your own soul, generating 50 Runic Power.

Usable while stealthed.

Soul Warden.name: Soul Warden
Soul Warden.description: Increases your melee attack power by 1 for every 100 Armor you have.

Soulbender.name: Soulbender
Soulbender.description: Significantly increases the Runic Power generated by Deathchaser.

Soulforged Weaponry.name: Soulforged Weaponry
Soulforged Weaponry.description:
Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25%.

While dual-wielding, your auto attacks now have a 8% chance to make your next Murder free of cost.

Soulfused Constitution.name: Soulfused Constitution
Soulfused Constitution.description: Your Tormented Souls now creates 1 additional soul for each Reaped Soul active.

Soulrend.name: Soulrend
Soulrend.description: Rend an enemies soul, dealing 107 Shadow damage, generating Runic Power and causing your attacks to ignore 20% of their Armor for 15 sec.

Soulrot.name: Soulrot
Soulrot.description:
Damage dealt by Deathchaser now applies Soulrot.SoulrotRot the soul of your target, cursing them for 15 seconds. At the end of the duration the enemy will take damage based on the number of stacks accrued. 

Each instance of damage from Deathchaser adds 1 stack to this effect, up to 20 stacks. Dispelling this effect causes the dispeller to instantly take 1200 + 200% AP Shadow Damage.

Souls for the Slaughter.name: Souls for the Slaughter
Souls for the Slaughter.description: Critical strikes with Slaughter now cause your auto attacks to deal an additional 85% Shadow damage for 5 seconds.

Soulsight.name: Soulsight
Soulsight.description:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, dealing direct damage now has a 15% chance to generate a Soul Fragment.

Soulslam.name: Soulslam
Soulslam.description:
Shatter the souls of nearby enemies, dealing 39 Shadowfrost Damage and horrifying them in place for 3 sec.

Generates 20 Runic Power.

Soulstorm.name: Soulstorm
Soulstorm.description: Requiem and Soulrend now have a 40% chance to refund a Reaped Soul.

Soulstrider.name: Soulstrider
Soulstrider.description: Increases the movement speed granted by Veilwalk by 20%.

Soultaker.name: Soultaker
Soultaker.description: Damage dealt with Dreadwake now reduces the cooldown of Tormented Souls by -1 sec.

Spectral Scythe.name: Spectral Scythe
Spectral Scythe.description:
Summons 1 Spectral Scythe for each Reaped Soul active which attack a nearby enemy for 20 seconds.

Striking enemies with Soul Strike causes the Spectral Scythe to attack that enemy and 5 nearby enemies. 

Consumes Reaped Souls and Soul Infusion.

Spectral Warden.name: Spectral Warden
Spectral Warden.description: Summon a spectral guardian to fight along side you for 20 seconds and apply an absorption shield to up to 8 allies within 20 yds, absorbing 199 + 150% Stamina damage.

Spectre.name: Spectre
Spectre.description:
Level 30 Passive
Reduces the cooldown of Underwalk by -10 sec.

In addition, Withering Touch will now always apply Ghost Claw to the target.Ghost Claw (Speed)Chill an enemy with a ghostly claw, slowing and stealing -50% of their movement speed for 8 seconds.

Spectre Stride.name: Spectre Stride
Spectre Stride.description:
Reappear behind your target and ambush them, striking them for 146 Shadow damage.

Generates 20 Runic Power.

Spectre's Call.name: Spectre's Call
Spectre's Call.description: Increases the damage of Deathwind, Murder, and Soul Strike by 15%.

Spirit Army.name: Spirit Army
Spirit Army.description:
Your Spectral Warden now causes you to summon 2 additional Spectral Wardens, but their duration is reduced by -8 sec.

In addition, increases the amount absorbed by the shield granted by Spectral Warden by 100%.

Spirit Chaser.name: Spirit Chaser
Spirit Chaser.description: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Reap, Deathchaser, and Wraithblade by 10%.

Spirit Culling.name: Spirit Culling
Spirit Culling.description:
For the duration of Spectral Scythe, the damage of Soul Strike is increased by 20%.

In addition, generating a Reaped Soul now has a 10% chance to summon a Spectral Scythe to fight alongside you for 10 sec.

Spirit Realm.name: Spirit Realm
Spirit Realm.description: Your Deathwind now also increases your healing taken by 10% while you stand within its radius.

Spirit Render.name: Spirit Render
Spirit Render.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell penetration by 20, scaling with your level.

Spiritual Reflexes.name: Spiritual Reflexes
Spiritual Reflexes.description: While below 35% maximum health, your chance to dodge attacks is increased by 25% and dodging an attack unleashes Soul Harvest on the target.Soul Harvest (Damage)Blasts your target for 1 + 5% AP + 10% shadow SP Shadow Damage, healing for 100% of the damage dealt.

The End Is Near.name: The End Is Near
The End Is Near.description: Wraithblade now creates a spectral version of yourself for 12 seconds that casts Dirge and Murder on enemies.

The Grim Reaper.name: The Grim Reaper
The Grim Reaper.description:
Your Ghost Claw transforms into Wraith Claw and now has 2 charges.Wraith Claw2 Charges,15 sec recharge
Chill an enemy with a ghostly claw, slowing and stealing -50% of their movement speed for 8 seconds.

Whenever you kill an enemy, refund a charge of this ability. Scales with modifiers to Ghost Claw.

The Jailer's Call.name: The Jailer's Call
The Jailer's Call.description: Attacks against enemies below 20% health deal an additional 140 + 18% AP Shadow damage.

The Time Has Come.name: The Time Has Come
The Time Has Come.description: Your abilities now deal 10% more damage against slowed targets.

This Is My Domain.name: This Is My Domain
This Is My Domain.description:
Level 50 Passive
Increases the amount healed through the Harvest - Level 10 Passive by 10% and causes being in your Harvesting Grounds to increase this effect by an additional 25%.

To The Shadowlands.name: To The Shadowlands
To The Shadowlands.description: Increases the duration of Soulslam by 1 sec.

Tormented Souls.name: Tormented Souls
Tormented Souls.description:
Create 1 Tormented Soul and generate Runic Power for each Reaped Soul active.

Consumes Reaped Souls and Soul Infusion.
Tormented SoulsReduces all direct damage you take by -10% and heals you for 35 + 5.8% AP + 24% Stamina, removing 1 stack. Lasts 20 seconds.

Tormentor.name: Tormentor
Tormentor.description:
Level 10 Passive
Consuming Soul Infusion now reduces the cooldown of Tormented Souls by -3 sec.

Unbound.name: Unbound
Unbound.description: Your Reliquary of the Lost is now guaranteed to critically strike for 25% increased damage on enemies below 20% health.

Veilwalk.name: Veilwalk
Veilwalk.description:
2 Charges, 60 sec recharge
Move with spectral agility, gaining 50% increased movement speed for 5 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Removes all movement impairing effects. Usable while stealthed.

Warden of the Lost.name: Warden of the Lost
Warden of the Lost.description: Damage dealt by Spectral Scythes and Spectral Wardens now reduces the cooldown of Spectral Warden by -0.5 sec.

Weakened Souls.name: Weakened Souls
Weakened Souls.description:
Level 10 Passive
Your Soulrend now also applies Weakened Soul, increasing the target's Shadow and Frost damage taken from you by 10%.

Well of Eternity.name: Well of Eternity
Well of Eternity.description: Increases the duration of your Spectral Scythes by 10 sec.

Well of Souls.name: Well of Souls
Well of Souls.description: Damage dealt by Soul Strike and Murder now reduces the cooldown of Spectral Scythe by -1 sec.

Withering Touch.name: Withering Touch
Withering Touch.description: Your touch rots armor and resolve, reducing the target’s armor by -20% and increasing their Magic damage taken by 10% for 1 minute, and generates Runic Power.

Wraithblade.name: Wraithblade
Wraithblade.description:
|cff5ee2ffGenerates 3 Reaped Souls|r
Strike for 150% Weapon Damage plus 89 Shadow damage, ignoring resistances, absorption, and invulnerability effects.
